$jsonSchema.description: Employee document for pizzeria staff, distinguishing cook and delivery roles

name.description: Full name of the employee - required

role.description: Job role of the employee within the pizzeria - required

storeId.description: Reference to the store where the employee is assigned - required

hiredAt.description: Date when the employee was hired - required

vehicleType.description: Vehicle used for delivery - only applicable to delivery role (optional)
